name: AttributeOperations
description: AttributeOperations schema from AWS IAM Identity Center

allOf.description: A string representation of the path to a given attribute or sub-attribute. Supports JMESPath.
The value of the attribute. This is a Document type. This type is not supported by Java V1, Go V1, and older versions of the AWS CLI.

items.description: An operation that applies to the requested group. This operation might add, replace, or remove an attribute.
